headline: A video that was never filmed
Code becomes video. Pixel-perfect. Every time.
body: HeyGen's Hyperframes converts HTML and CSS directly into MP4 video files. No browser recording, no screen capture, no rendering pipeline. The code becomes the video. Deterministically, pixel-perfect, every time.

headline: Built for AI agents, not humans
body: This was built specifically for AI agents. An agent writes HTML, runs Hyperframes, and gets back a video file. No human opens a browser. No GUI interaction. Pure code-to-video generation.

headline: $15,000 video project for nearly zero
body: Marketing agencies currently charge $3,000-15,000 for animated product videos. Hyperframes can generate the same output from a template and data feed in seconds. The cost drops to nearly zero.

headline: 10,000 personalized videos from one template
body: The real disruption: dynamic video at scale. Personalized videos for 10,000 customers, each with different names, products, and offers, generated from a single HTML template. Try doing that in After Effects.

headline: Video becomes the default, not the premium
body: Static images and text are losing the attention war. Video converts 2-3x better across every platform. Hyperframes makes video the default output format, not a premium add-on.

headline: Follow for more on AI media tools
